technical_replicate: the cells were passaged in 6 well plates in triplicates
experimental_design: Comparative analysis of Integrin components with Sharma et al., 2015 revealed perturbations in ILKAP, ITGA6 as well as a kinase named ILK which is a key mediator of the integrin pathway and several downstream cascades.
factor_value: Patients were assigned WHO Grades namely MGI, MGII, and MGIII post histopathological examination.
number_of_technical_replicates: the cells were passaged in 6 well plates in triplicates
